content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 — review prompts use the system `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` (App/ReviewManager.swift:10) with milestone-based throttling; the only store URL is a plain share link, not a write-review deep link (App/ShareSheet.swift:5), and metadata contains no rating-incentive copy.
